### Please read this first

- Have you checked the README, docs, and design manifesto?
- Have you searched existing issues for related questions?

### Question

Describe what you are trying to understand or decide.

### Context

Include relevant code snippets, service topology, PostgreSQL/Redis setup,
LiteLLM/provider setup, Gateway configuration, or error output. Redact all
secrets and prompts.

### Affected area

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] Authentication / virtual keys
- [ ] Policy
- [ ] LiteLLM / provider routing
- [ ] Streaming
- [ ] Usage tracking
- [ ] Rate limits / budgets
- [ ] PostgreSQL
- [ ] Redis
- [ ] Relayna runtime integration
- [ ] Studio integration
- [ ] Packaging / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
